alignments.candidate_evidence: 8 years strategy & operations at Google scaling global commercial systems; designed go-to-market frameworks and pricing execution across product lines
alignments.job_requirement: Build and design pricing strategy and frameworks covering product suite, utilising different pricing methodologies

alignments.candidate_evidence: Proficient SQL/BigQuery (joins, GROUP BY, subqueries, window functions); builds Looker dashboards; advanced Excel/Sheets; owns data analysis and shapes own datasets
alignments.job_requirement: Analyse internal and external data, maintain pricing benchmarks, enhance pricing philosophy

alignments.candidate_evidence: Global commercial operations experience at scale; cross-regional stakeholder management and GTM strategy
alignments.job_requirement: Define pricing strategy across regions; perform market research and competitor analysis

alignments.candidate_evidence: 8-year track record of stakeholder influence and executive-level communication in complex cross-functional environment
alignments.job_requirement: Prepare and present pricing proposals to key individuals; influence across organisation

alignments.candidate_evidence: Proven collaboration with commercial and operations teams on strategy, execution, and rollout
alignments.job_requirement: Work closely with commercial and marketing to create pricing collateral

alignments.candidate_evidence: SQL proficient (BigQuery); Looker dashboard builder; Tableau experience
alignments.job_requirement: Experience with SQL and BI tools (stated as plus)

gaps.gap: No stated experience in payment processing, payment schemes (Visa/Mastercard), or card issuing pricing models
gaps.mitigation: Candidate's core commercial operations and pricing-methodology background (cost-plus, value-based frameworks) are domain-agnostic. Fintech pricing domain can be acquired through onboarding and collaboration with Product and Finance teams. No re-architecture of foundational skills required.

gaps.gap: Limited evidence of post-implementation pricing performance analysis and feedback loops in prior roles
gaps.mitigation: Candidate's data-analysis tooling (SQL, BigQuery, Looker) and metrics-driven approach to commercial programs provide foundation. Role clarity and mentoring on fintech KPIs will close this quickly.

gaps.gap: No explicit consulting, case-team, or pricing-boutique advisory background
gaps.mitigation: Candidate's internal strategy and operations depth, stakeholder influence, and analytical rigor substitute for classic pricing-consulting playbook. Cross-functional collaboration skills are demonstrated at scale.

output.level_rationale: Title "Senior Associate" with 3–5 years of implied pricing/commercial experience required. Scope spans cross-functional strategy, data analysis, and market research with stakeholder influence across Product, Finance, and Commercial. No manager-of-managers or Director-level scope stated. Aligns with L4 mid-career ownership in a fintech scale-up.
output.summary: Candidate brings 8 years of Google Devices/Services Strategy & Operations with commercial transformation, SQL/BigQuery data work, advanced analytics, and cross-functional influence. Role is a strong fit for pricing strategy and operational rigor, but requires direct payment-processor or scheme pricing experience (candidate has not demonstrated this domain). SQL and BI tooling are strengths. Gap: no stated fintech or pricing-specific background; this is learnable with strong analytic and commercial foundations already present.
uncertainties: Company size and stage not stated in JD; fintech scale-up context inferred from customer list (eBay, Spotify, Uber) but growth trajectory and pricing maturity not clear
Depth of 'pricing projects' expected (candidate's experience framed as commercial ops strategy, not dedicated pricing work) may require validation in conversation
Whether candidate's Google Devices context (hardware-adjacent pricing) translates well to digital payments and software-as-a-platform pricing models
